---
title: "test_collision_investigator_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_collision_investigator_empire.py"
loc: 58
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.20
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 4.16
overall_score: 3.42
---

## Intent
The `test_collision_investigator_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on sovereign_vector_instance, test_search_queries. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via sovereign_vector_instance, test_search_queries. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `sovereign_vector_instance`
- `test_search_queries`
